# Pull Request Template

## Description
Brief summary of changes.

## Type of Change
- [ ] New module/feature
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Example/tutorial

## Checklist
- [ ] I've read [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] Code follows style (`make fmt`)
- [ ] Tests added/updated
- [ ] `make test` passes locally
- [ ] `make lint` passes locally
- [ ] Documentation updated (README.md)
- [ ] Token/cost impact analyzed (if applicable)

## Cost Impact (if applicable)
- Expected token usage per operation: `N tokens → $X`
- Estimated monthly cost at scale: `1M users → $Y`

## Related Issues
Closes #

## Notes for Reviewers
Any specific areas to focus on.
